creator: oh@fixmbr.de
text:
x11-wm/obconf segfaults on two different machines. Furthermore there are other in FreeBSD forum with the same problem.

(obconf:19661): Gtk-WARNING **: GtkSpinButton: setting an adjustment with non-zero page size is deprecated
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

How-To-Repeat: Just compile and run it.
